nodes.name: CONF
nodes.description: V2.05 Update hwHybridDynBwPunish and hwHybridDynBwResume, modify their description.

children.name: hwHybridRttCheckTimes
children.description: The value of this object identifies the hybrid-access tunnel rtt check times.

children.name: hwIpv6Tunnel4Over6CfgTable
children.description: MIB table for 4Over6 tunnel configuration information.

children.name: hwTunnelCfgTable
children.description: MIB table for the tunnel configuration information.

children.name: hwHybridAccessTunnelGlobalStatTable
children.description: This object indicates the MIB table for hybrid access tunnel statistics information.

children.name: hwHybridAccessTunnelGlobalStatEntry
children.description: This object indicates the hybrid access tunnel statistics parameters.

children.name: hwTunnelType
children.description: This object indicates the tunnel type.

children.name: hwTunnelCreateSuccessCnt
children.description: The value of this object identifies the total number of GRE tunnels set up on each device.

children.name: hwTunnelAuthNotAllowedCnt
children.description: The value of this object identifies the number of authentication/authorization requests rejected because of Service not allowed

children.name: hwTunnelOutDataFlow
children.description: This object indicates the uplink data volume using the tunnel connection.

children.name: hwTunnelAuthenAttemptCnt
children.description: The value of this object identifies the number of authentication attempts of GRE Tunnels.

children.name: hwTunnelCreateFailThreshold
children.description: This value of this object identifies the threshold of tunnel failures.

children.name: hwTunnelKeepaliveTimeoutPeriod
children.description: This value of this object identifies the interval used to check tunnel keepalive timeouts.

children.name: hwTunnelKeepaliveTimeoutThreshold
children.description: This value of this object identifies the threshold of tunnel keepalive timeouts.
